productDisplayName: Nike Kids Sport Hi Quarter Pack of 3 Socks
description: These sporty socks from nike will keep your kid's feet toasty warm. Breathable fabric and great stretch make these a practical everyday choice, while children will appreciate the cool colour combinations and prominent nike branding.Made of 77%  cotton, 22%  nylon and 1%  spandex, it provides all-day comfort, stretch and moisture wicking propertiesThe arch support offers a secure, stable FitGreater shock absorption properties1st pair is melange grey with white and light blue bands2nd pair is white with a wide navy blue bands under the cuffc3rd pair is light blue with a dark navy blue band under the cuffsBrand name woven on the side of the cuffs for all three pairsRib knit cuff with roomy toe area for superior comfort and durabilitySock careMachine wash cold in 30 degree water Use non-chlorine bleachTumble dry lowDo not iron or dry clean
